heading: Multi-year contracts for supplies and services
label: 2829 Multi-year contracts for supplies and services
text: The Secretary concerned may make contracts for periods of up to four years for supplies and services for the management, maintenance, and operation of military family housing and may pay the costs of such contracts for each year out of annual appropriations for that year.
notes: Effective DateFor effective date and applicability of section, see , set out as a note under .section 12(a) of Pub. L. 97–214section 2801 of this title
